description: Fix deploy script bugs: PANEL_PORT variable is used in post-deploy diagnostics section of deploy.sh (lines 110, 114) and in deploy-report.sh (line 28) but is never defined or sourced. The main health check at line 84 correctly reads PANEL_ADDR from panel.env. The post-deploy section should reuse PANEL_ADDR instead of the nonexistent PANEL_PORT. Also, the default port fallback is 8088 but install.sh defaults to 8080, creating inconsistency.
steps: In deploy.sh, replace the post-deploy diagnostics section (lines 108-116) to use the already-parsed PANEL_ADDR variable instead of PANEL_PORT. Replace 'http://127.0.0.1:${PANEL_PORT:-8088}' with 'http://${PANEL_ADDR}' (PANEL_ADDR is already set with fallback on line 84).

In deploy-report.sh, replace 'http://127.0.0.1:${PANEL_PORT:-8088}' on line 28 with proper PANEL_ADDR parsing. Add PANEL_ADDR extraction logic similar to deploy.sh (grep from panel.env, default to 127.0.0.1:8080 to match the Go default and install.sh default).
Fix the default port fallback in deploy.sh line 84: change '127.0.0.1:8088' to '127.0.0.1:8080' to match the actual Go default in config.go line 95 and install.sh.
acceptance_criteria: deploy.sh no longer references PANEL_PORT variable anywhere
deploy-report.sh uses a properly sourced PANEL_ADDR with correct default (8080)
All port defaults are consistent: 8080 across deploy.sh, deploy-report.sh, config.go, and install.sh
shellcheck-clean patterns (no unquoted variables where possible)
verification: Run: grep -n 'PANEL_PORT' deploy.sh deploy-report.sh (should return no results)
findings: Clean implementation. No issues encountered. bash -n syntax checks pass for both scripts, PANEL_PORT is fully eliminated, go build and go test both pass.
